audio_clips.text: "Boiling water in a pot. Sanitize 1-quart jars, add dill, measure 1 cup water. Pour water into saucepan."
"Mix: 1 Tbsp SALT, 1 tsp SUGAR, 1 tsp PEPPERCORNS, 1 tsp CARAWAY, 1.5 tsp DILL SEED. Boil."
A cutting board displays Kirby cucumbers, a clove of garlic, and fresh dill next to a pot of brine, while a jar is filled with the brine solution.
The jar is sealed with a lid, indicating it's ready for storage. A tag is being written with 'Dill Pickles' and a date.
"Bread and Butter. Ingredients: WHITE VINEGAR 1/2 cup, CIDER VINEGAR 1/2 cup, WATER 1/4 cup. Boiling on stove."
"Combine in pot: 1 cup sugar, 1 tbsp salt, 1 tsp peppercorns, 1 tsp dry mustard, 3-4 cloves, 1 tsp celery seed, 1/2 tsp turmeric. Mix well."
"Cucumber slices and red chilies on a board. Pour liquid brine over them in a bowl."
"SPICY: Pickles in brine. Mix 2 cups white vinegar, 2 cups water, 1 tbsp salt, 1 tsp peppercorns, 1 tsp red pepper flakes."
"SPICY: 1 tsp CARAWAY SEED, 1/2 tsp DRY MUSTARD added to a boiling pot, then transferred to a jar."
"Mason jar with Kirby cucumbers, garlic, jalapeno, next to brine saucepan on wood. Sealed jar labeled 'Spicy Pickles.'"
"Pickles in a jar, labeled 'Refrigerate, store up to 2 months,' are placed in a fridge. Later, they're put on a cheeseburger patty with ketchup."
"A glass of red liquid with a lime slice and celery stalk."
"Ingredients: 3 WAYS PICKLES - Dill, Bread & Butter, Spicy. SUBSCRIBE for more recipes."
